commits.message: feat(call): freeze flash-tip lands in production CallSquad
commits.author: shalombook

commits.message: feat(onboarding): add /onboarding-free variant for India activation test (#48)
commits.author: shalomer

commits.message: feat(preview): flash tip now appears as centered overlay, not in-place size jump
commits.author: shalombook

commits.message: feat(preview): add /preview/freeze-flash UI preview + Issue #11 design plans
commits.author: shalombook

panels.title: feat(call): freeze flash-tip lands in production CallSquad
panels.scene: Villagers in medieval armor celebrate wildly around a frozen block of ice containing a flickering, pixelated 'flash tip' fairy. Knight stands nearby, looking unimpressed.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: The dreaded Flash Tip is finally imprisoned!

bubbles.speaker: Knight
bubbles.text: It was just a minor visual annoyance.

panels.title: feat(onboarding): add /onboarding-free variant for India activation test
panels.scene: A map of India is being unfurled from the castle balcony. A single villager faints dramatically at the sight of it. The knight stands nearby, arms crossed.

panels.title: feat(preview): flash tip now appears as centered overlay
panels.scene: Villagers gasp and point at a floating, centered 'Flash Tip' icon projected onto the clouds. A previously off-center, smaller icon lies shattered on the ground.

panels.title: 4 commits. Flash tips conquered. India on board.
panels.scene: The knight sits wearily on a crate. In the background, the villagers are erecting a giant statue of a centered flash tip overlay.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: Let us celebrate the glorious centering!
